positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at dawn. The composition is circular and highly symmetrical, featuring bold silhouettes of pine trees, fox-like figures, and blooming magical flora. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and emerald green. The style should emulate contemporary modern folk art and negative space design, ensuring clean, crisp lines perfect for apparel printing. The central focus is a winding path leading to a glowing, stylized forest clearing. Graphic, flat vector style, high contrast, solid colors, no gradients.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, fuzzy, noise, low detail, watermark, signature, text, cropped, artifacts, bad anatomy, messy, overly complex, gradients, bokeh
